title: Mechanical Engineer
description: Design and develop mechanical systems, components, and products across manufacturing, HVAC, or automotive industries

title: Civil Engineer
description: Plan and oversee construction of infrastructure including roads, buildings, bridges, and drainage systems

title: Electrical Engineer
description: Design electrical systems, circuits, and power distribution for buildings, industrial plants, or electronics

title: HVAC / MEP Engineer
description: Design heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and mechanical systems for commercial and residential buildings

title: Structural Engineer
description: Analyze and design structural systems for buildings, bridges, and infrastructure to ensure safety and compliance

title: Environmental Engineer
description: Develop solutions to environmental problems including water treatment, pollution control, and waste management

title: Chemical / Process Engineer
description: Design and optimize chemical processes, reactors, and production systems in oil, gas, or manufacturing

title: Industrial Engineer
description: Improve efficiency in production systems, logistics, and operations using engineering and data analysis

title: Systems Engineer
description: Integrate complex engineering systems ensuring subsystems work together across hardware and software domains

title: Geotechnical Engineer
description: Investigate soil and rock conditions to support foundation design and earthworks for construction projects

title: Construction Manager / Site Engineer
description: Manage construction projects on-site, coordinating contractors, budgets, and timelines to deliver built assets

title: Renewable Energy Engineer
description: Design and optimize solar, wind, or other renewable energy systems for power generation and grid integration

title: Biomedical Engineer
description: Apply engineering principles to healthcare, designing medical devices, diagnostic equipment, or clinical systems

title: Manufacturing Engineer
description: Optimize production processes and design tooling to improve quality, cost, and throughput in manufacturing plants
